name: Armor Class
definition: An Armor Class (AC) is the target number for an attack roll. AC represents how difficult it is to hit a target.
full_text: An Armor Class (AC) is the target number for an attack roll. AC represents how difficult it is to hit a target. Your base AC calculation is 10 plus your Dexterity modifier. If a rule gives you another base AC calculation, you choose which calculation to use; you can't use more than one.
multiple_calculations: If a rule gives you another base AC calculation, you choose which calculation to use; you can't use more than one.
